features.name: async_set_dff_with_retime
features.description: Code should include a flip-flop with async set (active-high load) controlled by one clock, used in same module as another flip-flop with async clear of opposite polarity
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk1, posedge aload) begin if (aload) in1_reg <= 1'b1; else in1_reg <= in1; end

features.name: async_clear_dff_with_retime
features.description: Code should include a flip-flop with async clear (active-low clear) controlled by one clock, used in same module as another flip-flop with async set of opposite polarity
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk2, negedge aclr) begin if (!aclr) out1 <= 1'b0; else out1 <= in1_reg && clk2; end

features.name: mixed_async_polarity_dff
features.description: Code should include two always blocks with DFFs using different async control polarities (one posedge aload, one negedge aclr) that interact via a reg wire
features.snippet: reg in1_reg; always @(posedge clk1, posedge aload) begin if (aload) in1_reg <= 1'b1; else in1_reg <= in1; end
